word: G1814 - ἐξάλλομαι - exállomai - ex-al'-lom-ahee - Leap up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξάλλομαι

- Transliteration: Exallomai

- Phonetic: ex-al'-lom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to leap up

- Origin: from G1537 and G242

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G242; to spring forth: - leap up.
